note: Web-only. ZERO consensus / scripts / src changes. website/sost-dex.html: new gold-coloured tagline added above the existing hero subtitle to communicate the canonical product description in one line: "Decentralized exchange of PoPC (Proof of Personal Custody) contracts for tokenized and/or physical gold." Existing subtitle (Buy, sell, split and track... AI-assisted trade composition. Passkey & biometric device authentication.) is preserved and its animation delay bumped from delay-1 to delay-2 so both lines animate sequentially. No CSS class changes; the new tagline reuses the hero-subtitle class with inline gold/weight overrides.
